particulars.description: All and whole the subjects known as and forming 273 stonelaw road. Rutherglen, glasgow, G73 3RN, being the whole subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN84117.

All and whole the former ground floor bank premises known as 272 stonelaw road, rutherglen G73 3SB forming the areas tinted pink, and the areas tinted green and blue within the area edged red, all as shown on the plan as annexed and executed as relative to the standard security; which subjects comprise (in the first place) all and whole the two shops formerly known as 272 and 274 stonelaw road, rutherglen as more particularly described in disposition by john hutcheson winning to the national bank of scotland limited dated 26 february and recorded in the division of the general register of sasines applicable to the county of lanark on 26 april, both dates in the year 1947; (in the second place) all and whole that shop formerly known as 274 and a half stonelaw road, rutherglen as more particularly described in disposition by john mcneil winning, norman gow winning, robina minto winning or kitson and alexander macallan, the trustees of the late john hutcheson winning to the national bank of scotland limited dated 26 and 27 december 1956 and recorded in the said division of the general register of sasines on 25 january 1957; (in the third place) all and whole that shop formerly known as 276 stonelaw road, rutherglen as more particularly described in disposition by john mcneil winning, norman gow winning, robina minto winning or kitson and alexander macallan, the trustees of the late john hutcheson winning to the national bank of scotland limited dated 22, 23 24 and 27 and recorded in the said division of the general register of sasines on 31, all dates of january 1959; and (in the fourth place) all and whole that former house entering by the common stair number 1 highburgh drive, burnside as more particularly described in disposition by frederick turton and elizabeth carpy or turton in favour of the royal bank of scotland limited dated 29 december 1969 and recorded in the said division of the general register of sasines on 13 january 1970.
